2603.20639.title: Agentic AI and the next intelligence explosion
2603.20639.paper_summary: The "AI singularity" is often miscast as a monolithic, godlike mind. Evolution suggests a different path: intelligence is fundamentally plural, social, and relational. Recent advances in agentic AI reveal that frontier reasoning models, such as DeepSeek-R1, do not improve simply by "thinking longer". Instead, they simulate internal "societies of thought," spontaneous cognitive debates that argue, verify, and reconcile to solve complex tasks. Moreover, we are entering an era of human-AI centaurs: hybrid actors where collective agency transcends individual control. Scaling this intelligence requires shifting from dyadic alignment (RLHF) toward institutional alignment. By designing digital protocols, modeled on organizations and markets, we can build a social infrastructure of checks and balances. The next intelligence explosion will not be a single silicon brain, but a complex, combinatorial society specializing and sprawling like a city. No mind is an island.
2603.20639.paper_summary_zh: 「AI奇點」常被錯誤地視為一個單一的、類神的心智。進化則暗示了一條不同的道路：智慧本質上是多元的、社會性的和關聯性的。最近在代理AI方面的進展顯示，前沿推理模型，如DeepSeek-R1，並不是僅僅透過「思考更久」來提升性能。相反，它們模擬內部的「思維社會」，自發的認知辯論，進行辯論、驗證和調和以解決複雜的任務。此外，我們正進入一個人類與AI的半人馬時代：集體行動超越個人控制的混合行為者。擴展這種智慧需要從二元對齊（RLHF）轉向制度對齊。透過設計以組織和市場為模型的數位協議，我們可以建立一個社會基礎設施，實現制衡。下一次智慧爆炸不會是一個單一的矽腦，而是一個複雜的、組合的社會，像城市一樣專業化和擴張。沒有任何心智是孤島。
2603.20639.author: James Evans et.al.
2603.20639.authors: James Evans, Benjamin Bratton, Blaise Agüera y Arcas
